_provenance: Hand-labeled by the project author on 2026-07-11 from the three snapshotted docs pages, the seeded demo instance, and the PR #37045 diff. Authored independently of system output; system runs must never edit this file.

requirements._match_rule: A gold requirement is 'recalled' if one extracted Requirement's statement+acceptance_clues (casefolded) contain all keywords of the gold entry.

must_extract.note: Users can create labels for a repository (Issues -> Labels).
Labels classify issues and pull requests.
Templates pre-populate the issue creation form.
Text like #1234 in descriptions/comments is parsed into links to issues.

expected_absent_in_crawl.reason: The seeded demo repository has no issue template files; the crawl scope never renders a templated issue form.
Organization settings pages are outside the allowed crawl routes.

links._match_rule: A gold link matches a TraceLink (auto_accepted or needs_review) whose element name equals element_name (casefold), whose element's screen route_pattern equals route, and whose target symbol file equals symbol_file.

impacts._match_rule: Required entities must appear among affected entities of findings for PR 37045; forbidden files must appear in the unmapped list, never in findings.
